info.name: Pass Expiry Reminder Master
info.description: Tests PassExpiryReminderMaster scheduler job: seed an Active pass with endDate=today+N, trigger the master job, verify the rider received a PASS_EXPIRY_REMINDER push via mock-fcm. Negative case verifies riders with a PreBooked pass are excluded.

exec: // Auto-skip mock-server requests when envType is not Local.
// Set envType=Local in Local env files; omit / set to 'Master' otherwise.
console.log('[skip] mock-only request on envType=' + envType + ': ' + (pm.info && pm.info.requestName));
function lazyMobile(key) { if (!pm.collectionVariables.get(key)) pm.collectionVariables.set(key, '8' + Math.floor(100000000 + Math.random() * 899999999)); }
function lazyToken(key, tag) { if (!pm.collectionVariables.get(key)) pm.collectionVariables.set(key, 'test-pass-expiry-' + tag + '-' + Date.now()); }

body.raw: {"db_name":"atlas_dev","db_schema":"atlas_app","table_name":"merchant_push_notification","touch_timestamps":true,"on_conflict_do_nothing":true,"values":{"id":"{{_pn_template_id}}","key":"PASS_EXPIRY_REMINDER","title":"Pass expiring in {#days#} days","body":"Your pass is set to expire in {#days#} days. Renew now to keep enjoying your benefits.","fcm_notification_type":"TRIGGER_FCM","language":"ENGLISH","merchant_id":"{{bap_merchant_id}}","merchant_operating_city_id":"{{bap_merchant_operating_city_id}}","should_trigger":true}}

exec: console.log('Deleted MerchantPushNotification cache keys for this mocId:', pm.response.json().deleted);
// time_diff_from_utc (Seconds) is needed for endDate math: handler uses todayLocal = (now + timeDiffFromUtc).utctDay
// Snapshot remind_everyday_until_pass_expiry so Phase B.1-B.4 (daily mode) can flip it and restore
// Snapshot pass_expiry_reminder_batch_size so Phase C (pagination) can pin it to 4 and restore

// Set both fields BEFORE the master ever runs. The handler's getConfig path uses an in-process IM.withInMemCache (TTL 1h); once Phase A's master populates that cache, a later UPDATE-then-trigger sequence reads the stale row regardless of Redis invalidation. Setting daily=true here means Phase A also runs in true-branch (range query [today+1, today+3]) — the positive rider's endDate=today+3 still falls in range, and per-pass daysRemaining renders 'Pass expiring in 3 days' identically. Trade-off: legacy false-branch equality query is no longer integration-tested here; that path is unchanged by this PR.
console.log('Pre-existing FCM count for positive token:', (pm.response.json() || []).length);
console.log('Pre-existing FCM count for negative token:', (pm.response.json() || []).length);
// Compute target endDate in city-local time so it matches the handler's todayLocal+N
pm.test('Seed positive Active OK', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Seed negative Active OK', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Seed negative PreBooked OK', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
console.log('Drained pre-trigger FCM count for positive token:', (pm.response.json() || []).length);
console.log('Master job scheduled:', d.jobId, 'shard:', d.shardId, 'key:', d.zsetKey);
// Poll mock-fcm /read/<token> until a PASS_EXPIRY_REMINDER notification arrives.
console.log('FCM poll attempt', attempt, 'error:', err.message || err);
console.log('FCM poll attempt', attempt, 'got', msgs.length, 'msgs (total', received.length + ')');
var titles = received.map(function (m) { var aps = m && m.message && m.message.apns && m.message.apns.payload && m.message.apns.payload.aps; return (aps && aps.alert && aps.alert.title) || ''; });
var hasPassExpiry = titles.some(function (t) { return t.indexOf('Pass expiring in') === 0; });
pm.test('Positive rider received a PASS_EXPIRY_REMINDER FCM', function () {
var titles = received.map(function (m) { var aps = m && m.message && m.message.apns && m.message.apns.payload && m.message.apns.payload.aps; return (aps && aps.alert && aps.alert.title) || ''; });
var expected = 'Pass expiring in ' + n + ' days';

item.name: Verify Negative Rider Got No FCM

exec: pm.test('Negative rider (has PreBooked pass) received NO PASS_EXPIRY_REMINDER', function () {
var titles = msgs.map(function (m) { var aps = m && m.message && m.message.apns && m.message.apns.payload && m.message.apns.payload.aps; return (aps && aps.alert && aps.alert.title) || ''; });

// Phase B target dates in city-local time, matching the handler's todayLocal arithmetic. The daily flag is already set by the early 'Set RiderConfig' step (must precede Phase A's master to beat the in-mem cache lock-in).
function dateStr(offsetDays) { return new Date(localTodayMs + offsetDays * 86400000).toISOString().split('T')[0]; }

item.name: Seed Today Pass (endDate=today, should be excluded by lower bound)
Seed Expired Pass (endDate=today-1, should be excluded)
Seed d_neg PreBooked Pass (excludes d_neg from daily mode)

exec: console.log('Phase B master scheduled:', d.jobId, 'shard:', d.shardId, 'key:', d.zsetKey);
// B.1 assertion: d1's pass expires in 1 day, so PN title must contain '1 days' (template is 'Pass expiring in {#days#} days', plural-only).
pm.sendRequest({ url: fcmUrl + '/read/' + token, method: 'GET' }, function(err, res) {
if (err) { console.log('d1 poll', attempt, 'err:', err.message || err); }
else { var msgs = res.json() || []; received = received.concat(msgs); console.log('d1 poll', attempt, 'got', msgs.length, '(total', received.length + ')'); }
var titles = received.map(function(m){ var aps = m && m.message && m.message.apns && m.message.apns.payload && m.message.apns.payload.aps; return (aps && aps.alert && aps.alert.title) || ''; });
var hasOneDay = titles.some(function(t){ return t === 'Pass expiring in 1 days'; });
pm.test('d1 received PASS_EXPIRY_REMINDER with daysRemaining=1', function(){

item.name: Wait for multi FCM (exactly 1 PN, daysRemaining=1)

exec: // B.2 assertion: multi rider has two Active passes (today+1, today+3); the Map.fromListWith min must collapse to a single PN with daysRemaining=1.
pm.sendRequest({ url: fcmUrl + '/read/' + token, method: 'GET' }, function(err, res) {
if (err) { console.log('multi poll', attempt, 'err:', err.message || err); }
else { var msgs = res.json() || []; received = received.concat(msgs); console.log('multi poll', attempt, 'got', msgs.length, '(total', received.length + ')'); }
var titles = received.map(function(m){ var aps = m && m.message && m.message.apns && m.message.apns.payload && m.message.apns.payload.aps; return (aps && aps.alert && aps.alert.title) || ''; });
var passExpiryTitles = titles.filter(function(t){ return t.indexOf('Pass expiring in') === 0; });
var hasOneDay = titles.some(function(t){ return t === 'Pass expiring in 1 days'; });
pm.test('multi received exactly 1 PASS_EXPIRY_REMINDER (min-pick over duplicate person)', function(){

// Phase C: with batch_size=4 hoisted into the early Set step, this trigger creates a master that paginates over 9 in-range rows (4 from Phase B + 5 from Phase C). Expected schedule: batch-1 fires at T+10s (4 rows), batch-2 at T+15s (4 rows), batch-3 at T+20s (1 row), batch-4 at T+25s (0 rows -> drained). All 5 p* riders should receive 'Pass expiring in 1 days' within ~25s.
console.log('Phase C master scheduled:', d.jobId, 'shard:', d.shardId);

item.name: Wait for p1 FCM (Phase C pagination)

exec: // Phase C assertion: p1 receives 'Pass expiring in 1 days' regardless of which batch its row lands in. MAX_ATTEMPTS=8 (40s window) covers the worst-case batch-3 firing at T+20s plus FCM dispatch latency.
pm.sendRequest({ url: fcmUrl + '/read/' + token, method: 'GET' }, function(err, res) {
if (err) { console.log('p1 poll', attempt, 'err:', err.message || err); }
else { var msgs = res.json() || []; received = received.concat(msgs); console.log('p1 poll', attempt, 'got', msgs.length, '(total', received.length + ')'); }
var titles = received.map(function(m){ var aps = m && m.message && m.message.apns && m.message.apns.payload && m.message.apns.payload.aps; return (aps && aps.alert && aps.alert.title) || ''; });
var hasOneDay = titles.some(function(t){ return t === 'Pass expiring in 1 days'; });
